name: Knowledge Graph from Wikilinks
description: Pure TypeScript module to extract and build directed graphs from markdown notes using [[wikilink]] syntax. Backlink indexing, graph visualization data, normalized slug matching.

input.name: notes
input.description: Array of markdown note objects with content containing [[wikilinks]]

output.name: graphData
output.description: Nodes (with degree) and edges ready for D3/Three.js/force-directed layout

output.name: backlinks
output.description: Reverse index mapping note ID to array of linking note IDs

author: Tiranyx
